results.title: Identity of Christmas Eve Powerball jackpot winner finally revealed
results.description: The brother of the Arkansas mayor could only remain anonymous for six months under state law.

results.title: Moscow summons Moldovan ambassador in protest against actions against Russian embassy staff
France also seeks to ban children from using social networks
results.description: French lawmakers will vote on the 21st of July on a law that would ban social networks for children under 15, joining several countries considering the unpopular move among teenagers, Reuters reports. If passed, France would follow Australia’s example, which banned children from platforms such as Facebook, Instagram, Snapchat, TikTok and YouTube last December. French [...] The post France also seeks to ban children from using social networks appeared first on Baltic News Network .

results.title: Panel formed to select Kerala State Commission for Protection of Child Rights chief
results.description: Kerala forms a committee to select the new chairperson for the State Commission for Protection of Child Rights.

results.title: DWP confirms 3 workplace supports for people with one condition to ‘remain in work’
results.description: The DWP will confirmed the reforms will have clearer standards around workplace support
